feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Integration Suite
feed.subtitle: SAP Integration Suite Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Not able to print or save document over button "print view" in transaction ME22N
entry.content:
Dear guys,

I need your help.
A user has troubles with the "print view" button in the transaction ME22N (see attachement "Screenshot 1").
When the user klicks on the "print view" button he has the possibility to see, print and save a PDF order confirmation in principle.

The problem is that it seems like he has no authorization to print or save the PDF (see attachement "Screenshot 2").
As you can see, the print and save button are grey which means that the user is not able to use the functionality to print or save.

We already tried to execute the transaction SU53 to see if some permissions are missing but SU53 says that the last authorization check was sucessful...

I am not sure if the problem is a SAP problem or if we talking about some Acrobat Reader problems or something.
But in my opinion it is more likely not a SAP problem since the error message in the attachement "Screenshot 2" is in German (but my SAP language is English).

Any ideas what could be the problem?
Thanks in advance!

BR Thomas

entry.title: Re: Restrict some IP (BTP data center IP) for Outbound Ca...
entry.content:
Hello Aman,

you can enter the receiving party API/SFTP address as a cloud to on-prem connection on your cloud connector. Then you can use this connection in your Iflows like any other cloud to on-prem connection.

By doing that the request is send from the CPI to the cloud connector and from there to the receiving party.

This can be a solution for your issue, if the cloud connector use a static IP or connects via a proxy, that has a static IP address, to the internet. Only in this case you can share this IP address with your receiver and they can whitelist it.

 

best regards

 

Robert Quindt

entry.title: Re: Order release error - Message no. C2039
entry.content: SAP Error message No. C2039 due to material activated with serial number configuration. if you want to remove such kind of error message check with T code MM02 (work scheduling profile view) in this view serial number profile is assign with respective material. Then By using T code OIS2 (identify the serial number ranges and assign it to production order) then system will allow you to release Production.

entry.title: Search on article classification characteristics
entry.content:
hi,

Is it possible to search on article classification characteristics in the system?

br, Ralph

entry.title: Language Code for SAP Business Warehouse Application Server Power BI Connector
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am facing a problem in connecting to our SAP KPW server using SAP Business Warehouse Application Server Power BI Connector.

I am able to connect to the server from Power BI Desktop ONLY if I select language code as EN. If I don't, it mentions that I don't have the right credentials.

So from Power BI desktop, I chose the language and I entered my credentials and I was able to connect.

 

Now the problem happens once I publish the same working dashboard to the Power BI service. It seems that when the dashboard is published to the service, Power BI service sort of "loses" this language code parameter, so it keeps showing me a message that my credentials are invalid (like it used to do on Power BI desktop when I did not enter the language parameter). I keep trying to enter the credentials again on the semantic model settings, but it just keeps telling me it's invalid.

This started happening only recently after we have been told by the business that "A background platform called Business Objects is being decommissioned, and that we will be logging in using SAP Analytics Cloud, impacting how SAP connects to KPW or BW system" Before that, I was able to refresh the semantic model without issues from the Power BI service.

Is there a way to fix this? I was thinking maybe a parameter to be added by the end of the connecting server URL? Any other ideas?

Is my interpretation of what happened that it related to the language code even correct?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Error executing action: Could not fetch client creden...
entry.content: Hi, I am encountering the same issue right now. Did you find any solution? Opening a SAP ticket helped you?

entry.title: Re: How can I disable Swagger in Production but enable Sw...
entry.content: @adamreisberg commercewebservices

entry.title: Re: Random error message with the Learning Center
entry.content:
Hi Shane,

Thank you for your answer.

Good news, the error message seems to have disappeared.

Yes, we use an extended WA in the manager for providing the standard content.

I don't know how SEN is currently configured on FIORI side; I will check.

If I understand you, there could have been a "conflict" because of a duplicate between some standard content coming from the SAP content server and the extent content coming from our Workarea?

Is it possible to configure the Learning Center with several sources of content, and if yes, is it preferable to configure a unique source?

Kind regards,

entry.title: Add new column besides the hints in the log message section in /n/aif/err screen
entry.content:
Hi,

My requirement is to add a new column besides the hints in the log message section in AIF monitoring screen. New column should appear at the Black color section. Could you please tell me if it is feasible? If yes, which enhancement spot and badi definition can be used to achieve this?

Please provide the input.

Thanks in advance!!

entry.title: Re: How to do the accrual recalculation based on the work...
entry.content:
Hello Volker,

Thank you very much for your response.

I was checking in the implementation guide and I am unable to find the solution for my query, may be it's my bad. Could you please assist me with some inputs like KBA or Blog or Some Suitable Chapter in the implementation guide for the solution.

Regards

Abdul

entry.title: Re: Material status error not shown in Check Material Cov...
entry.content: The functionality of the "Display MRP Master Data Issues" is working fine, and we get an error in there. But the problem is in material coverage app. Before the upgrade we got the error message in a pop-up stating: "Error(s) occurred during the MRP run. Material cannot be used in MRP due to material status 05", when executing MRP for one specific material.

entry.title: Re: Which is the new version of C_HCADM_05 certification?
entry.content:
Hello @Margit_Wagner ,

Thanks for your response

I just have one follow up question: In https://training.sap.com/certification/validity thes is still no C_DBADM mentioned in the list of the valid certificates.

But when I explicitly search C_DBADM in the search bar : results appear as C_DBADM_2404.

So, Is this list in https://training.sap.com/certification/validity not updated completely??

entry.title: Integration Suite Requirement for India DRC Implementation
entry.content: It seems like SAP has implemented a new solution way of implementing SAP DRC for India with S/4HANA Public Cloud as the ERP system, where BTP Integration Suite (IS) may not be mandatory. The link https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/634261119fec4d58970471f2c4a9a740/0e048ecd2e42408a9f11205720e3501f.html shows that i's now available as a service without Integration Suite. BTP is still required to enable this service but this new architecture can help the customer to avoid extra IS licensing cost. Can anyone please confirm this? Of course, SAP still supports the legacy way using IS.

entry.title: Re: Service Layer Filter Does Not Work Correctly with Ope...
entry.content:
Hi Pipalia1,

The requests mentioned in SAP Note 3111211 are working perfectly fine in SP2402.

Can you please confirm what is not working for you? Is there any specific request?

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: Service Layer Filter Does Not Work Correctly with Ope...
entry.content:
Hi Ankit,

Thanks for your response. The following request is not working for us and returning only 1 result:

b1s/v2/Drafts?$filter=(DocEntry eq 3 OR DocEntry eq 2)

I have removed our URL from the above request.

Kind Regards,

Samir Pipalia

entry.title: Physical inventory document Count List - Printout Supplier Batch Number
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

is it possible to include the supplier batch information on the physical inventory document printout for materials tracked by batch? The reason I'm asking this is because  SAP batch number is not available physically on the item? Specifically, can the supplier’s batch number be added to the inventory list printout? 

Thank you in advance.  

SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud

entry.title: Missing Future Price at Group Level in ML
entry.content:
Hey all, 

we are currently inserting future prices via a .csv-file and BAPI_MATERIAL_SAVEDATA into the table MBEW. 

That automatically shows in MM03 in the accounting view 01 for the company code. It is mandatory however, that the future price is also shown at group level, but that one is empty. How can I also insert the future price at group level?

Thanks in advance. 🙂 


Kind regards
Kim

entry.title: CSRF Token for API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV via OAUTH
entry.content:
Hi

I am calling the API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV to POST attachments via OAUTH

The API for POST of attachments requires a CSRF Token but it seems I am not able to request it using OAUTH - only Basic Authentication will return it in the x-csrf-token response header.

Why can't I use OAUTH for both?

entry.title: Re: New Certification program - Four attempts for certifi...
entry.content:
Hi @elgst 

The four certification attempts are only included in the new SAP Learning Hub and SAP Learning Hub, partner edition (available for SAP PartnerEdge members subscriptions).
Learners with an existing subscription to previous SAP Learning Hub editions (like SAP Learning Hub, professional edition) would need to transition and subscribe to the new SAP Learning Hub in order to benefit from the four certification attempts.
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: SAP Signavio Internal infrastructure Error/ Faild to...
entry.content:
Hello Niels, 

this was a central issue that briefly existed for pipelines. A manual start of the "T&L" should run through. Let us know if the manual retriggering does not resolve the issue. 

Best
Manuel
